claims.claim: AI x crypto (provenance, verifiable identity, proof of personhood)
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: US regulatory uncertainty as a drag
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: ETH as the L2 settlement/DA platform bet
claims.label: confirmed

claims.claim: BTC / spot Bitcoin ETF as market-structure catalyst
claims.label: absent

missed_changes: Heavy emphasis on shipping open-source public-goods infra (Jolt zkVM, Helios light client) that a16z crypto pledges to 'never monetize' — a builder/strategy stance the prediction didn't anticipate
Reframed Apple/EU DMA app-store changes (alternative payment processors, browser engines) as a concrete near-term opening for mobile crypto/USDC payments
Strong, specific endorsement of Worldcoin/World Network proof-of-personhood + sybil resistance as the answer to AI deepfakes (the 'mystery meat' content-provenance scenario)
Enthusiasm for DUNA, a native legal entity for DAOs
Active engagement with DeFi/AMM design research (LVR, fixed/variable-rate AMMs, Morpho/DELV) — a sector the prediction never mentioned
Endorsement of airdrop sybil-filtering (LayerZero) and PoS slashing-security formalization
notes: Window covers Jan–Jun 2024. ZK/zkVMs (Jolt), L2 scaling/superchain (Helios, Optimism podcast, 4844 blob data), stablecoins/payments (USDC), and AI x crypto (provenance/proof-of-personhood) are the dominant, repeatedly-confirmed themes. Memecoin wariness and speculation-vs-usage concern are confirmed in force (multiple 4/24 threads). ETH confirmed as a platform bet (not price). DePIN and BTC/spot-ETF are both fully absent — he never discusses physical-infra token networks, and his only SEC-account mention (1/10) is about phishing/account security, not the ETF as a catalyst. Onchain-UX marked confirmed on the general stance ('UX evolving — never a better time to build', mobile-crypto-browser interest), but account-abstraction specifics (ERC-4337, embedded wallets, sponsored gas) are absent. Regulatory concern confirmed though he frames it as 'improving' ('ammo to politicized regulators', 'rules need updating'). Security confirmed via Security Alliance / Whitehat Safe Harbor work. risk_on confirmed only at the loose 'constructive-on-trajectory' level the prediction itself used (persistent build-optimism); he makes no explicit macro/market-risk call. No contradictions found.
